Patch Set 14: Code-Review+1

Majorily package refactoring with minimal code changes.
Looks good to me, though I couldn't deep dive to check each line.

Patch Set 14:

> Patch Set 14: Code-Review+1
> 
> Majorily package refactoring with minimal code changes.
> Looks good to me, though I couldn't deep dive to check each line.

It is easier to read this code if you check it out and read it as a new set of code. The diff in gerrit is much harder for me to read.

This kind of change needs to happen as a "big bang", but this type of change should happen only once and not be needed again.

Patch Set 14: Code-Review-2

Local sonar testing shows that line coverage drops from 56.6% to 40% with this merge. This has to be resolved before we can merge this - we're not permitted to drop below 55% line coverage at any time.

Patch Set 14:

I will try to see why coverage is dropping and fix it next week.
